### Highlights | 更新内容

- 修复了 CoreHID 自由鼠标在多屏和边缘切换下最容易出问题的几个点：离开串流窗口、重新进入、点击命中和悬浮球触发现在都更贴近原本 HID 的自由鼠标体验，减少了错位、飘移和边缘卡顿。
  Fixed the most visible CoreHID free-mouse issues around multi-display and edge transitions. Leaving the stream window, re-entering it, click targeting, and floating-ball activation now behave much closer to the original HID free-mouse path, with less offset, drift, and edge stutter.
- CoreHID 权限引导更完整了：设置页和欢迎页现在会直接提示输入监控状态，并在“已经授权但需要重进串流”时给出明确状态，避免看起来像已经允许却仍显示未授权。
  CoreHID permission onboarding is now more complete. The settings page and welcome sheet show the Input Monitoring state directly, including a clear “granted, re-enter stream” state so it no longer looks like permission was allowed while the UI still says it was denied.
- 新增了欢迎页权限引导，以及 AWDL 稳定性辅助的持久化 Helper 安装入口；从 GitHub Release 下载的构建也会把 Helper 一起打包进去，后续使用时少一次折腾。
  Added a first-launch permissions welcome sheet and a persistent Helper install path for the AWDL Stability Helper. GitHub Release builds now bundle the helper as well, which reduces the extra setup needed later.
- 麦克风权限链路补齐了缺失的 entitlement，系统设置中的权限展示和实际授权行为会更接近预期，方便后续把本地麦克风传到主机端。
  The microphone permission path now includes the missing entitlement, so System Settings visibility and actual authorization behavior line up better when you want to stream the local microphone to the host.

### Maintenance | 维护更新

- CI 现在会额外校验 release app 包内是否真的包含 AWDL Helper，避免出现构建成功但发布产物缺少 Helper 的情况。
  CI now verifies that the release app bundle actually contains the AWDL helper, preventing “successful” builds that publish an app without the helper inside.
- 这一版主要是稳定性与权限体验修复，没有额外引入新的输入模式开关；重点是把已有 CoreHID、自由鼠标、欢迎引导和 Helper 安装链路收稳。
  This release is mainly about stability and permission-flow fixes rather than adding more input toggles. The focus is on making the existing CoreHID, free-mouse, welcome onboarding, and helper-install paths feel solid.
